meaning: n.学问,知识,(动物的)眼光知识
examples: Wedded to lore and logic long ago.
The fatal events are now part of nuclear lore.
They’ve used private incantations, exotic lore, and secret formulas.
Another large relic backed by lore is the Panagia Myrtidiotissa monastery, the largest in Cythera.
His existence has become part of local lore in the small Maine town of Rome.
